ddls:
CREATE TABLE "learners" (
  "learner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each learner */,
  "school_code" TEXT /* Code of the school where the learner is enrolled */,
  "learner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the learner */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the learner */,
  "date_of_enrollment" TEXT /* Date when the learner enrolled in the program */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the learner */,
  "pin_code" INTEGER /* Pin code of the learner's residence */,
  "educational_qualification" TEXT /* Highest educational qualification of the learner */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the learner */,
  "father_husband_name" TEXT /* Name of the learner's father or husband */,
  "occupation_father_husband" TEXT /* Occupation of the learner's father or husband */,
  "mother_name" TEXT /* Name of the learner's mother */,
  "occupation_mother" TEXT /* Occupation of the learner's mother */,
  "monthly_income_household" REAL /* Monthly income of the learner's household */,
  "total_male_members_household" INTEGER /* Total number of male members in the learner's household */,
  "total_female_members_household" INTEGER /* Total number of female members in the learner's household */,
  "mobile_number" TEXT /* Mobile number of the learner */,
  "landline_number" TEXT /* Landline number of the learner */,
  "sewing_machine_at_home" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the learner has a sewing machine at home */,
  "association_social_group" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the learner is associated with any social group */,
  "district_code" INTEGER /* Code of the district where the learner resides */,
  "learner_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the learner */,
  "learner_photo" TEXT /* Photo of the learner */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "health_conditions" TEXT /* Health conditions of the learner */,
  "language_spoken" TEXT /* Languages spoken by the learner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("learner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learners_district_code FOREIGN KEY ("district_code") REFERENCES districts ("district_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learners_school_code FOREIGN KEY ("school_code") REFERENCES schools ("school_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_code" TEXT /* Code of the school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "school_contact" TEXT /* Contact number of the school */,
  "district_code" INTEGER /* Code of the district where the school is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code of the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "monthly_fee" REAL /* Monthly fee for the course */,
  "course_duration_months" INTEGER /* Duration of the course in months */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who teaches the course */,
  "course_materials" TEXT /* Materials provided for the course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "learner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the learner */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the learner enrolled in the course */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the learner completed the course */,
  "certificate_issued" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the learner has received a certificate */,
  "course_completed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the learner has completed the course */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment */,
  "attendance_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of attendance for the learner in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_learner_id FOREIGN KEY ("learner_id") REFERENCES learners ("learner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "learner_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome record */,
  "learner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the learner */,
  "planned_activity" TEXT /* Planned activity after completing the course */,
  "actual_activity" TEXT /* Actual activity after completing the course */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status of the learner */,
  "monthly_income_after_training" REAL /* Monthly income of the learner after completing the course */,
  "training_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the learner about the training */,
  "post_training_support" TEXT /* Support received by the learner after training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learner_outcomes_learner_id FOREIGN KEY ("learner_id") REFERENCES learners ("learner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_code" INTEGER /* Code of the district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the district is located */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date of the attendance */,
  "present" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the learner was present */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, trainer, coordinator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
